errors.duplicate_product: The same product cannot be registered more than once.
errors.cash_session_required: You must have an open cash session to register a sale.
errors.customer_not_found: The selected customer is not available.

errors.customer_fiscal_data_required: The selected customer must have complete fiscal data or be marked as a Final Consumer.
